---
title: "Toolkit"
description: "Modeling toolkit and methods for CESM-WACCM-CARMA paleoclimate simulations."
---

::: {.eyebrow}
Modeling Toolkit
:::

# Methods this site should grow around.

::: {.toolkit-grid}
::: {.toolkit-card}
### Coupled climate experiments

CESM experiment design, transient forcing scenarios, ensemble comparisons, and sensitivity tests.
:::

::: {.toolkit-card}
### Paleoclimate constraints

Boundary-section evidence, soot deposition records, isotopic signals, and proxy-model comparison.
:::

::: {.toolkit-card}
### WACCM-CARMA

CESM-WACCM-CARMA combines coupled Earth system boundary conditions, high-top atmospheric chemistry, and aerosol microphysics. It lets impact-emission experiments track soot, dust, sulfate, ozone chemistry, radiation, and climate recovery within one modeling framework.
:::
:::
